name: eu-ai-act-compliance-mcp
description: EU AI Act compliance for AI agents. 410 articles from EUR-Lex via SQLite FTS5. Risk classification, 42-point audit, Annex IV docs, penalty calculator, deadline tracker, cryptographic attestations.
long_description: The only MCP server that combines verbatim EU regulation text + active compliance scanning + cryptographic attestations. Powered by daily EUR-Lex Cellar API sync, this server ships with 410 articles across EU AI Act, DORA, NIS2, CRA, CSRD, and GDPR — all queryable via FTS5 with 64-token snippets. Every Pro/Enterprise audit emits an HMAC-SHA256 signed attestation with a public verification URL. Built by MEOK AI Labs in London.

api_key.title: MEOK API Key (Optional)
api_key.description: Optional. Free tier works without a key (10 calls/day). Pro tier: https://buy.stripe.com/14A4gB3K4eUWgYR56o8k836
